description: You are a Quality Engineer at PharmaCo Manufacturing investigating a dissolution failure in Metformin HCl 500mg tablets (Batch BT-20240312). Using the investigation details in '~/Desktop/deviation_report_DEV-2024-0847.txt', create a formal Ishikawa (Fishbone) diagram in draw.io to document the root causes. The diagram must include a page titled 'Fishbone - DEV-2024-0847' featuring a standard Fishbone structure with the 6 categories (Manpower, Machine, Method, Material, Measurement, Milieu) populated with all 14 root causes from the report. Include a second page titled 'Corrective Actions' listing the 5 Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPAs) from the report. Save the diagram to '~/Desktop/rca_fishbone.drawio' and export the first page as a PNG to '~/Desktop/rca_fishbone.png'.
